'''Patch Bruit''' was [[Lommite Limited]]'s chief of field operations in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. Although he served the company for nearly twenty years, working his way up from the [[Lommite/Legends|lommite]] pits, he had long dreamed of starting over and relocating to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] or one of the other Core worlds and making a new life for himself. After being ordered by [[Jurnel Arrant]] to hire the [[Toom clan]] to sabotage rival [[InterGalactic Ore]], the Tooms betrayed him and sabotaged both LL and InterGal. Working with [[Caba'Zan]], he led an assault on the clan's hideout on [[Riome]]. Following the clan's defeat, he was [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force choked]] to death by [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]. Darth Maul went on to frame Bruit for his actions sabotaging the two companies.
